title: Plastoid Pitt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Plastoid Pitt''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Xucphra City]] on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. Many beings who entered the cantina were abducted, and later sold as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra]]''
